title: polygala vulgaris subvar. ciliata
intro: Polygala vulgaris subvar. ciliata, commonly known as the common polygala or ciliata polygala, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to help with issues such as kidney problems, urinary tract infections, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Polygala vulgaris subvar. ciliata can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
